do_not_claim: legal 1836 frontiers — hints are illustrative for the historical sniff test

priority_region.label: Western Europe
priority_region.notes: M16 second era geometry pack. Post-Napoleonic / Belgian independence readability for the Victoria-leaning 1836 start.

source_notes: Curator-authored soft frontier bands and sample hard overrides for M16 multi-era packs.
Not derived from proprietary game maps.
Hard overrides target beta sample province_ids (sample_*); they skip cleanly on full Natural Earth builds.
Soft boundary hints are geographic and apply on any scaffold that intersects the priority region.
